rationale: Refactored managed cancel/fetch cleanup into shared best-effort helpers so cleanup is centralized instead of duplicated across branches.
Managed cancel cleanup now runs through a single try/finally path, eliminating duplicated cleanup_run_support calls.
Informational bot walkthrough only; it did not request a concrete additional change.
Split immediate materializer cleanup from deferred publish support cleanup and added failure-safe cleanup coverage for the fetch-result path.
Launcher now returns immediate cleanup paths separately from deferred publish support so secret-bearing materializer files are deleted on process exit.
Supervisor failure in the background task now triggers best-effort launcher/deferred cleanup before returning.
adapter.fetch_result(run_id) now executes inside the try/finally so cleanup still runs when result fetching raises.
Fetch-result cleanup is now best-effort and cannot override a successful activity result; both cleanup steps are attempted independently.
agent_runtime_cancel treats launcher cleanup as best-effort, so cleanup failures no longer mask cancel behavior.
The fetch-result regression suite now asserts cleanup has not run before the publish step, covering the ordering regression directly.
Informational PR overview only; no additional action item beyond the inline comments.
